kirundi.splash_proof_chemical_safety_goggles_n: Amadarubindi y'umutekano y'imiti abuza gutera amazi, si amadarubindi asanzwe
kirundi.protects_skin_from_corrosive_acids_and: Ririnda uruhu aside na base bishenya
kirundi.button_it_up_protects_clothing_and_ski: Fungisha utubuto: birinda imyenda n'uruhu kugira amazi ateranywe
kirundi.no_sandals_or_open_toed_shoes_in_the_c: Nta nkweto zifunguye cyangwa zerekana intoki z'ibirenge muri laboratwari y'imiti
kirundi.know_where_it_is_before_you_start_you_: Menya aho hari mbere yo gutangira: ufite amasegonda 10 nihagira icyaguteranira
kirundi.acetic_acid_is_flammable_know_your_nea: Aside acetic irahita: menya igikoresho cyo kuzimya umuriro kiri hafi yawe
kirundi.sds_reviewed_for_chemicals: Urupapuro rw'amakuru y'umutekano (SDS) rwasuzumwe ku miti
kirundi.safety_data_sheets_list_all_hazards_pp: Impapuro z'amakuru y'umutekano zishyira ku rutonde akaga kose, ibikoresho by'ubwirinzi, n'inzira z'ibihutirwa
kirundi.always_add_titrant_slowly_near_the_exp: Buri gihe ongeraho titrant buhoro hafi y'ingingo y'iherezo witezwe. Igitonyanga kimwe gishobora guhindura pH cyane!
kirundi.the_ph_is_changing_rapidly_in_a_real_l: pH irahinduka vuba! Muri laboratwari nyayo, hindukira ku kongeraho igitonyanga ku gitonyanga kandi uzunguze nyuma ya buri gitonyanga.
kirundi.you_overshot_the_equivalence_point_in_: Warengeje ingingo y'uburinganire! Muri laboratwari nyayo, ugomba gutangira bundi bushya n'icyitegererezo gishya.
kirundi.good_lab_practice_always_rinse_the_bur: Imikorere myiza ya laboratwari: banza woze biuret n'amazi yagejejwe, hanyuma n'umuti wa titrant mbere yo kuyuzuza bundi bushya.
kirundi.at_the_half_equivalence_point_ph_pka_t: Ku ngingo y'igice cy'uburinganire pH = pKa. Iyi ni yo hagati y'akarere ka buffer!
kirundi.kmno_is_a_strong_oxidizer_in_a_real_la: KMnO₄ ni oxidizer ikomeye! Muri laboratwari nyayo, uyishyire kure y'imiti ishonga ya organic kandi ukoreshe fume hood. Umuhengeri → nta rangi = ingingo y'iherezo.
kirundi.polyprotic_acids_have_multiple_equival: Aside za polyprotic zifite ingingo nyinshi z'uburinganire! Reba uko umurongo w'S ugenda ureshya hagati ya buri ngingo (uturere twa buffer).
kirundi.in_a_back_titration_you_add_excess_aci: Muri titration yo inyuma, ubanza kongeraho aside irenze, hanyuma ugakora titration y'aside isigaye. Ikorera ku byitegererezo bidashonga nka CaCO₃.
kirundi.never_add_water_to_concentrated_acid_a: Ntukongereho amazi kuri aside ikomeye na rimwe! Buri gihe ongeraho aside mu mazi. «Kora neza: aside mu mazi.» Ihinduka risohora ubushyuhe rishobora gutera guteranywa bibi.
kirundi.when_using_volatile_reagents_like_nh_o: Iyo ukoresha reagents zihindagurika nka NH₃ cyangwa HCl (ikomeye), buri gihe kora munsi ya fume hood. Guhumeka umwuka wa aside/base bangiza ingirabuzimafatizo z'ibihaha.
kirundi.read_the_burette_at_the_bottom_of_the_: Soma biuret hasi ya meniscus, ijisho ryawe riri ku rwego rw'ubuso bw'amazi. Ikosa rya parallax rigira ingaruka ku bunyabwenge!
kirundi.while_pouring_hcl_some_splashes_on_you: Mu gusuka HCl, bumwe buteranira ku kuboko kwawe.
kirundi.remove_clothing_rinse_under_running_wa: Kuramo imyenda, uze munsi y'amazi atemba iminota 15+
kirundi.correct_immediate_and_prolonged_rinsin: Byukuri! Koga ako kanya no mu gihe kirekire ni ingenzi cyane. Iminota 15 irinda kwangirika kw'ingirabuzimafatizo.
kirundi.wrong_wiping_can_spread_the_acid_and_p: Ikosa! Guhanagura bishobora gukwirakwiza aside no kuyinjiza mu ruhu rwawe. Ukeneye amazi atemba ako kanya.
kirundi.apply_baking_soda_paste_directly_to_sk: Siga baking soda ku ruhu buhoro
kirundi.not_recommended_the_neutralization_rea: Ntibisabwa! Ihinduka ryo kunga rikora ubushyuhe (risohora ubushyuhe) rishobora kwiyongera ku gutwikwa. Amazi buri gihe ni igisubizo cya mbere.
kirundi.dangerous_even_dilute_acids_can_cause_: Akaga! Ndetse na aside zacogoye zishobora gutera gutwikwa mu gihe. Buri gihe cyakira ihura ry'imiti ako kanya.
kirundi.naoh_solution_splashes_into_your_eyes_: Mu kuzunguza, umuti wa NaOH uteranira mu maso yawe.
kirundi.go_to_eyewash_station_immediately_rins: Jya aho koga amaso ako kanya, uze iminota 15+, ugume ufunguye ibihenehene
kirundi.correct_speed_is_everything_you_have_a: Byukuri! Umuvuduko ni byose: ufite hafi amasegonda 10 mbere y'uko kwangirika gukomeye gutangira. Gumana ibihenehene bifunguye kandi uhindukize umutwe wawe kugira ngo urinde ihumana gukwirakwira mu jisho rindi.
kirundi.never_rub_this_spreads_the_chemical_ac: Ntusunike na rimwe! Ibi bikwirakwiza imiti ku buso bunini bw'ijisho kandi bishobora gukoma cornea.
kirundi.use_eye_drops_from_the_first_aid_kit: Koresha ibitonyanga by'amaso biva mu gakoresho k'ubutabazi bwa mbere
kirundi.eye_drops_are_insufficient_you_need_hi: Ibitonyanga by'amaso ntibihagije! Ukeneye koga byinshi mu minota 15+. Ibitonyanga by'amaso ntibishobora gutanga ibyo.
kirundi.extremely_dangerous_naoh_causes_alkali: Akaga cyane! NaOH itera gutwikwa kwa alkali kwinjira mu maso mu gihe. Buri segonda ni ingenzi. Guteranywa kw'ijisho n'imiti ni impamvu ya #1 y'ubuhumyi muri laboratwari.
kirundi.large_acid_spill_on_bench: Kumeneka gukomeye kwa aside ku meza!
kirundi.you_knock_over_the_beaker_of_0_1m_hcl_: Uhindukije beaker ya 0.1M HCl, imeneka nka 200 ml ku meza.
kirundi.alert_others_contain_with_absorbent_ne: Menyesha abandi, tanga imipaka n'ikinyunyuza, kunga na NaHCO₃, sukura n'amazi
kirundi.perfect_procedure_1_alert_nearby_stude: Uburyo bwuzuye! (1) Menyesha abanyeshuri bari hafi (2) Tanga imipaka ku gukwirakwira ukoresheje pad y'ikinyunyuza (3) Sanga sodium bicarbonate kugira ngo unge (4) Sukura n'amazi (5) Jugunya neza.
kirundi.partially_right_but_incomplete_floodin: Byukuri igice ariko ntibishyitse. Kuyuzuza gukwirakwiza aside kurushaho kandi ntibiyunga. Banza utange imipaka, hanyuma unge, hanyuma woge.
kirundi.telling_the_teacher_is_good_but_at_0_1: Kubwira umwarimu ni byiza ariko kuri 0.1M ibi birashobora gucungwa. Ugomba gutangira gucunga ako kanya mu gihe umuntu abwira umwigisha. Ntukemere ko igera ku mpera y'ameza.
kirundi.paper_towels_are_not_appropriate_for_a: Taulo z'impapuro ntizikwiye ku kumeneka kwa aside! Ntiziyunga aside kandi uzafata ibikoresho byatoshywe na aside. Koresha agakoresho k'imeneka kakwiye.
kirundi.while_working_with_ammonia_nh_you_noti: Mu gukora na ammonia (NH₃), ubona impumuro ikaze kandi amaso yawe atangira kwiraguza amarira.
kirundi.move_the_experiment_to_the_fume_hood_i: Jyana igerageza kuri fume hood ako kanya, injizamo umwuka mu karere
kirundi.correct_volatile_chemicals_like_nh_mus: Byukuri! Imiti ihindagurika nka NH₃ igomba gucungwa munsi ya fume hood. Niba ushobora kuyumva impumuro, uyihumeka. Fungura amadirishya kandi usohoke ujye mu mwuka mwiza niba hood iri kure.
kirundi.a_regular_face_mask_does_not_protect_a: Agapfukamunwa gasanzwe ntikarinda umwuka w'imiti! Ukeneye kurinda guhumeka bikwiye (ntibiboneka muri laboratwari nyinshi z'amashuri) cyangwa fume hood.
kirundi.fan_the_fumes_away_with_your_hand: Yungura umwotsi ugende kure n'ukuboko kwawe
kirundi.fanning_is_for_wafting_to_detect_odors: Kuyungura ni ukugira ngo uzane umwuka buhoro kugira ngo umenye impumuro (kuzana umwuka buhoro ku mazuru yawe). Ntibikuraho umwotsi w'akaga mu karere. Ukeneye injira y'umwuka!
kirundi.dangerous_if_you_can_smell_nh_the_conc: Akaga! Niba ushobora kuyumva impumuro ya NH₃, ubwinshi bushobora kurenga urwego rw'umutekano (25 ppm). Ihura ry'igihe kirekire ritera gutwikwa kw'imiti mu nzira y'ubuhumekero. NH₃ irenze 300 ppm ishobora kwica.
kirundi.a_classmate_suggests_cleaning_the_benc: Igihe ukiri ufunguye umuti wa ammonia, mugenzi wawe w'ishuri asaba gusukura ameza na bleach.
kirundi.stop_them_immediately_bleach_ammonia_t: Bahagarike ako kanya! Bleach + ammonia = gaze ya chloramine y'uburozi
kirundi.life_saving_action_naocl_2nh_2nh_cl_ch: Igikorwa cyo gukiza ubuzima! NaOCl + 2NH₃ → 2NH₂Cl (chloramine) — gaze y'uburozi itera kwangirika gukomeye kw'ubuhumekero. Iyi ni imwe mu mavange ataziguye ateje akaga cyane muri laboratwari. Buri gihe unge kandi ujugunye imiti yose mbere yo gukoresha umuti wo gusukura uwo ariwo wose.
kirundi.sure_bleach_is_a_disinfectant_it_shoul: Yego, bleach ni umuti wica udukoko, igomba kuba nziza
kirundi.extremely_dangerous_mixing_bleach_naoc: Akaga cyane! Kuvanga bleach (NaOCl) na ammonia bikora gaze ya chloramine y'uburozi. Byateje urupfu muri laboratwari no mu mazu. Ntuvange bleach n'undi muti uwo ariwo wose na rimwe.
kirundi.it_should_be_fine_if_the_ammonia_is_di: Igomba kuba nziza niba ammonia yacogoye
kirundi.wrong_even_dilute_ammonia_reacts_with_: Ikosa! Ndetse na ammonia yacogoye ihindukana na bleach ikora gaze ya chloramine y'uburozi. Ihinduka riba ku bwinshi ubwo aribwo bwose. Nta kugabanya bifite umutekano byo kuvanga iyi miti.
kirundi.just_open_a_window_and_it_will_be_fine: Gusa fungura idirishya kandi bizaba byiza
kirundi.ventilation_does_not_make_it_safe_to_g: Injira y'umwuka ntibituma biba byiza gukora gaze y'uburozi! Chloramine itera ingorane zo guhumeka ako kanya. Kwirinda ni bwo buryo bwonyine bwemewe.
kirundi.holds_the_analyte_solution_being_titra: Ifata umuti wa analyte ukorwaho titration.
kirundi.changes_color_to_signal_the_endpoint: Ihindura ibara kugira ngo yerekane ingingo y'iherezo.
kirundi.goggles_gloves_and_lab_coat: Amadarubindi, uduhu tw'amaboko, n'ikoti rya laboratwari
kirundi.all_three_are_mandatory_goggles_protec: Byose uko ari bitatu ni ngombwa: amadarubindi arinda amaso guteranywa, uduhu tw'amaboko turinda amaboko ibishenya, kandi ikoti ririnda imyenda n'uruhu.
kirundi.water_first_always_the_15_minute_rinse: Amazi mbere buri gihe! Koga iminota 15 ni ingenzi. Ibyunga bishobora gutera ihinduka risohora ubushyuhe ku ruhu.
kirundi.where_moles_of_acid_moles_of_base: Aho moles za aside = moles za base
kirundi.the_equivalence_point_is_the_stoichiom: Ingingo y'uburinganire ni ingingo ya stoichiometric. pH ku buringanire iterwa n'imbaraga za aside/base — ni pH 7 gusa ku aside ikomeye + base ikomeye.
kirundi.the_exothermic_reaction_can_cause_viol: Ihinduka risohora ubushyuhe rishobora gutera gutogota gukaze no guteranywa
kirundi.when_water_hits_concentrated_acid_the_: Iyo amazi akubise aside ikomeye, ubushyuhe busohotse bushobora gutogosa amazi ako kanya, bigatera guteranywa gukaze kwa aside ishyushye. Kongeraho aside mu mazi bikwirakwiza ubushyuhe mu bwinshi bunini bw'amazi.
kirundi.at_equivalence_only_the_conjugate_base: Ku buringanire, base conjugate (A⁻) yonyine isigara. Base conjugate ya aside idafite imbaraga ubwayo ni base idafite imbaraga, ituma umuti uba base (pH > 7).
kirundi.strong_acid_strong_base_or_weak_acid_s: Aside ikomeye + base ikomeye cyangwa aside idafite imbaraga + base ikomeye
kirundi.phenolphthalein_transitions_at_ph_8_2_: Phenolphthalein ihinduka ku pH 8.2-10.0 ihuye na pH y'uburinganire ya base ya titration ya aside idafite imbaraga + base ikomeye. Ikorera kandi ku aside ikomeye+base ikomeye kuko gusimbuka birenga urwego rwayo.
kirundi.bleach_ammonia_chloramine_gas_toxic_bl: Bleach + ammonia = gaze ya chloramine (uburozi). Bleach + aside = gaze ya chlorine (uburozi). Byombi bishobora gutera gukomereka gukomeye kw'ubuhumekero cyangwa urupfu. Ntuvange bleach n'imiti na rimwe.
kirundi.23_45_has_4_significant_figures_the_la: 23.45 ifite imibare 4 y'ingenzi. Umubare wa nyuma (5) wagereranyijwe hagati y'ibimenyetso. Biuret zinyabwenge kugeza ±0.05 ml.
kirundi.at_half_equivalence_ha_a_so_henderson_: Ku gice cy'uburinganire [HA] = [A⁻] bityo Henderson–Hasselbalch itanga pH = pKa + log(1) = pKa. Iyi ni yo hagati y'akarere ka buffer.
kirundi.when_handling_1m_concentrated_acids_or: Iyo ucunga aside cyangwa base ikomeye >1M
kirundi.face_shields_provide_splash_protection: Ingabo z'uraramutwe zitanga ubwirinzi bwo guteranywa ku maso yose. Zikenewe ku bishenya bikomeye (>1M), gushyushya, n'uburyo ubwo aribwo bwose bufite ingaruka zo guteranywa hejuru y'akarere k'amaso.
kirundi.naoh_causes_alkali_burns_that_penetrat: NaOH itera gutwikwa kwa alkali kwinjira mu jisho mu masegonda 10. Nta madarubindi, guteranywa kumwe gushobora gutera gutakaza kubona burundu.
kirundi.concentrated_hcl_dissolves_skin_on_con: HCl ikomeye ishonga uruhu igihe iyihuye. Ndetse na aside zacogoye zitera uburakari. Amaboko yawe ari hafi cyane y'imiti.
kirundi.a_splash_of_acid_or_base_will_burn_thr: Guteranywa kwa aside cyangwa base bizatwika binyuze mu myenda no mu ruhu. Ikoti ritanga urwego rw'inzitizi rushobora gukurwaho.
kirundi.a_dropped_beaker_sends_glass_and_chemi: Beaker yaguye yohereza ikirahure n'imiti hasi hose. Inkweto zifunguye intoki z'ibirenge bisobanura aside ku birenge byambaye ubusa.
kirundi.lab_access_granted: Uburenganzira bwo kwinjira muri laboratwari bwahawe
kirundi.equip_each_piece_of_ppe_before_proceed: Ambara buri gice cy'ibikoresho by'ubwirinzi mbere yo gukomeza. Muri laboratwari nyayo, ntushobora gukoraho imiti udafite ubwirinzi bwuzuye.
kirundi.find_each_piece_of_safety_equipment_on: Shakisha buri gice cy'ibikoresho by'umutekano ku ikarita ya laboratwari. Mu bihutirwa nyabyo, amasegonda ni ingenzi — ugomba kumenya aho byose biri mbere yo gutangira.
kirundi.the_10_second_rule_if_chemicals_splash: Itegeko ry'amasegonda 10: niba imiti iteranira mu maso yawe, ufite hafi amasegonda 10 yo kugera aho koga amaso mbere y'uko kwangirika burundu gutangira. Gumana ibihenehene bifunguye kandi woge iminota 15+.
kirundi.remember_p_a_s_s_pull_the_pin_aim_at_b: Ibuka P.A.S.S.: Pull (Kurura pini), Aim (Erekeza ku shingiro ry'umuriro), Squeeze (Kanda igikoresho), Sweep (Kubura uruhande rumwe ujya ku rundi). Aside acetic n'imwe mu miti ishonga birahita — menya iyi ahantu mbere yo gutangira.
kirundi.sds_documents_list_all_hazards_require: Inyandiko za SDS zishyira ku rutonde akaga kose, ibikoresho by'ubwirinzi bikenewe, intambwe z'ubutabazi bwa mbere, n'aho guhamagara mu bihutirwa ku muti wose muri laboratwari. Bisuzume mbere yo gucunga umuti uwo ariwo wose.
kirundi.you_can_now_locate_all_emergency_equip: Ubu ushobora gushakisha ibikoresho byose by'ibihutirwa uhereye ku meza yawe. Mu bihutirwa, buri segonda ni ingenzi — ubu bumenyi bushobora gukiza ubuzima.
kirundi.review_every_chemical_you_will_handle_: Suzuma buri muti uzacunga uyu munsi. Kanda buri karita kugira ngo wemere ko wumva akaga.
kirundi.tap_to_acknowledge_you_ve_reviewed_thi: ☝ Kanda kugira ngo wemere ko wasuzumye uyu muti
kirundi.lab_safety_confirmed_enter_virtual_lab: 🧪 Umutekano wa laboratwari wemejwe — Injira muri laboratwari y'ikoranabuhanga
kirundi.titration_lab_keyboard_shortcuts_1_thr: Laboratwari ya titration. Inzira ngufi za klavye: 1 kugeza 5 hindura tab.
kirundi.ppe_active_lab_safety_verified: Ibikoresho by'ubwirinzi birakora • Umutekano wa laboratwari wemejwe
kirundi.eyewash_10_second_rule_fire_extinguish: 🚿 Koga amaso: itegeko ry'amasegonda 10 • 🧯 Kuzimya umuriro cyaboneka • 📋 SDS yasuzumwe
kirundi.add_titrant_drop_by_drop_until_indicat: Ongeraho titrant igitonyanga ku gitonyanga kugeza ikigaragaza gihindura ibara. Ingingo y'uburinganire = uburinganire bwa stoichiometric; ingingo y'iherezo = aho ikigaragaza gihinduka. Ntibihora bimwe.
kirundi.match_real_world_unknowns_by_titrating: Huza ibitazwi by'isi nyayo ukora titration kugeza ±0.05 ml y'agaciro ka teoriya. Kurikirana ubunyabwenge + umuvuduko; guha amanota bihuye na AP Chem.
kirundi.safety_drills_what_could_go_wrong: Imyitozo y'umutekano — Ni iki cyagenda nabi
kirundi.burette_explodes_acid_burns_spill_indi: Biuret iraturika, kumeneka kwo gutwikwa kwa aside, ikigaragaza cyongewemo vuba cyane. Witoze urukurikirane rw'igisubizo cyiza mbere y'uko biba ingenzi muri laboratwari nyayo.
kirundi.burette_tolerance_0_05_ml_volumetric_f: Ihanganwa rya biuret 0.05 ml; flask y'ubwinshi 0.10 ml; pipette 0.02 ml. Icyiciro cy'ubunyabwenge A ugereranyije na B kikuba kabiri ikosa. Guhuza ni ingenzi kurusha uko abanyeshuri batekereza.
kirundi.stock_diluent_desired_concentration_th: Stock + ikigabanya → ubwinshi bushakwa. Ibibazo 4 bya AP Chem bipimwa cyane bigabanuka kuri iri hwanyakubara rimwe. Kurikirana imibare y'ingenzi: ipimo rifite imbaraga nke rigena igisubizo.
kirundi.buffer_discovery_when_does_a_buffer_ho: Kuvumbura buffer — Ni ryari buffer imara?
kirundi.adjust_acid_strength_a_ha_ratio_starti: Hindura imbaraga za aside, igipimo cya [A⁻]/[HA], na pH y'itangiriro. Ibisubizo bitandukanye: buffer nziza cyangwa buffer mbi (nyuma yo kongeraho aside yiyongera 20%). Nta manota, nta guhishura — gushakisha no kwitegereza gusa.
kirundi.redox_titration_not_a_ph_curve: ⚗ Titration ya redox — si umurongo wa pH.
kirundi.the_trace_shows_relative_reaction_prog: Umurongo werekana iterambere ry'ihinduka rigereranije, atari pH — nta mita ya pH hano. Ingingo y'iherezo ni ibara rya pinki ryoroheje rya mbere rimara riva ku kurenga guke kwa MnO₄⁻ (rikora ihinduka umuhengeri → nta rangi kugeza icyo gihe). Soma iyi ngingo y'iherezo mu ibara.
kirundi.reset_titration_volume_to_zero: Subiza ubwinshi bwa titration kuri zeru
kirundi.where_moles_of_acid_moles_of_base_the_: — aho moles za aside = moles za base. pH kuri iyi ngingo iterwa n'imbaraga za aside/base.
kirundi.where_the_indicator_changes_color_idea: — aho ikigaragaza gihindura ibara. Bahitamo neza kugira ngo ingingo y'iherezo ≈ ingingo y'uburinganire.
kirundi.the_flat_part_of_a_weak_acid_base_curv: — igice kireshya cy'umurongo wa aside/base idafite imbaraga aho pH irwanya impinduka (Henderson–Hasselbalch ikora).
kirundi.weak_acids_bases_that_change_color_at_: — aside/base zidafite imbaraga zihindura ibara ku turere twihariye twa pH. Hitamo iyo urwego rw'impinduka rwayo rukubiyemo pH y'uburinganire.
kirundi.acid_spill_neutralize_with_sodium_bica: — Kumeneka kwa aside: unge na sodium bicarbonate, hanyuma woge. Kumeneka kwa base: unge na aside citric yacogoye. Buri gihe menyesha abandi muri laboratwari.
kirundi.never_mix_bleach_with_ammonia_toxic_ch: — Ntuvange bleach na ammonia na rimwe (gaze ya chloramine y'uburozi). Ntukongereho amazi kuri aside ikomeye na rimwe (akaga ko guteranywa gusohora ubushyuhe — buri gihe ongeraho aside mu mazi).
kirundi.rinse_the_burette_with_the_titrant_sol: — Woze biuret n'umuti wa titrant mbere yo kuyuzuza. Zunguza buhoro nyuma ya buri kongeraho. Soma biuret hasi ya meniscus.
kirundi.neutralized_acid_base_solutions_ph_6_8: — Imiti ya aside/base yunzwe (pH 6–8) ishobora gusukwa mu muyoboro w'amazi n'amazi menshi. Ku miti ikomeye suzuma politiki y'imyanda y'imiti y'ikigo cyawe.
kirundi.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: Ukoresheje amagambo yoroshye ya buri munsi n'interuro ngufi
kirundi.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: Ku munyeshuri w'umwaka wa 5, muri make kandi mu bucuti
kirundi.for_a_high_school_chemistry_student_ac: Ku munyeshuri wa shimi w'amashuri yisumbuye, nyabwo ariko byumvikana
kirundi.click_explain_to_have_the_ai_tutor_des: Kanda «Sobanura» kugira ngo umwarimu wa AI asobanure iyi titration ku rwego rwo gusoma wahisemo.
kirundi.lab_safety_chemistry_challenge: 🏆 Ikibazo cy'umutekano wa laboratwari na shimi
kirundi.lab_safety_incident_simulator: 🚨 Igikoresho cyigana igikorwa cy'umutekano wa laboratwari
kirundi.practice_responding_to_real_lab_emerge: Witoze gusubiza ibihutirwa nyabyo bya laboratwari. Hitamo igisubizo cyiza ku buri muterere. Iyi myitozo ishobora gukiza ubuzima bwawe muri laboratwari nyayo!
kirundi.master_the_correct_technique_for_each_: Menya neza uburyo bukwiye ku gikoresho cyose. Uburyo bwiza = ibisubizo binyabwenge + akazi ka laboratwari gafite umutekano.
kirundi.c_v_c_v_calculate_how_to_dilute_a_stoc: C₁V₁ = C₂V₂ — bara uko wagabanya umuti wa stock kugeza ku bwinshi bushakwa.
kirundi.always_add_acid_to_water_never_water_t: Buri gihe ongeraho aside mu mazi, ntukongereho amazi kuri aside na rimwe. Kuvanga bisohora ubushyuhe kandi bishobora gutera gutogota gukaze no guteranywa kwa aside ikomeye.
kirundi.add_the_stock_solution_to_the_water_ne: Ongeraho umuti wa stock mu mazi (ntukongereho amazi kuri aside na rimwe!)
kirundi.stopper_and_invert_10_times_to_mix_tho: Funga kandi uhindure inshuro 10 kugira ngo uvange neza
kirundi.titration_curve_finding_the_equivalenc: Umurongo wa titration — Gushakisha ingingo y'uburinganire
kirundi.strong_acid_strong_base_ph_meter_shows: Aside ikomeye + base ikomeye · Mita ya pH yerekana gusimbuka
kirundi.three_sliders_weak_acid_strength_ka_bu: Ba-slider batatu: imbaraga za aside idafite imbaraga (Ka), igipimo cya buffer [A⁻]/[HA], na pH y'itangiriro. Kwigana kubwira niba buffer imara cyangwa inanirwa nyuma yo kongeraho aside yiyongera 20% (ibisubizo bitandukanye — nta «amanota ya buffer» y'umubare). Nyeganyega ba-slider. Andika ibyo witegereje. Andika ibyo wavumbuye ku byatuma buffer iba nziza.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_free_text_no_right_ans: Igitekerezo cyawe (inyandiko yigenga — nta gisubizo cyiza):
kirundi.what_single_condition_makes_the_differ: Ni ikihe kimwe cyihariye gitandukanya nziza na mbi? Igipimo ni ingenzi kurusha pKa? pH y'itangiriro ni ingenzi na gato? Andika teoriya yawe bwite.
kirundi.i_m_stuck_show_me_questions_to_think_a: 🤔 Nafashwe — nyereka ibibazo byo gutekereza (nta bisubizo)
kirundi.fix_ratio_at_1_0_sweep_pka_from_2_to_1: Fatanya igipimo kuri 1.0. Nyura pKa kuva 2 kugeza 12. Ese agaciro kamwe ka pKa ni buffer nziza kurushaho mu buryo busanzwe? Kuki byaba bimeze bityo?
kirundi.set_pka_4_74_acetic_acid_sweep_ratio_f: Shyiraho pKa = 4.74 (aside acetic). Nyura igipimo kuva 0.05 kugeza 20. Ni ku bihe bipimo buffer imara? Hari «agasanduku keza» gahwanye mu gipimo?
kirundi.find_one_good_buffer_then_change_one_s: Shakisha buffer nziza imwe. Hanyuma hindura slider imwe kugeza iba mbi. Ni impinduka imwe ihe ifite akamaro kurusha izindi?
kirundi.log_4_5_good_buffers_with_different_pk: Andika ba-buffer 4-5 beza bafite agaciro gatandukanye ka pKa. pH zabo z'itangiriro zisangiye iki na pKa zabo?
kirundi.in_real_biochemistry_blood_is_buffered: Muri biochimie nyayo, amaraso yubakwa buffer kuri pH 7.4 — ni akahe ka pKa kaba gakwiye cyane kuri iyo sisitemu ya buffer? Shakisha ushakisha ba-buffer phosphate na bicarbonate.
kirundi.i_think_i_understand_the_trade_offs_le: Ntekereza ko numva impinduranya — reka mbisobanure mu magambo yanjye bwite
kirundi.explain_in_your_own_words_what_is_the_: Sobanura mu magambo yawe bwite: isano riri hagati ya pKa, igipimo, na pH y'itangiriro ni irihe? Ni ikihe kimwe cyihariye (cyangwa ivanga) gituma buffer imara kuri aside nyinshi? Kuki urwego rw'igipimo ari ingenzi?
kirundi.saved_notice_nobody_checked_your_answe: ✓ Byabitswe. Icyitonderwa — nta muntu wasuzumye igisubizo cyawe. Iyi ni kamere y'ubushakashatsi buyoborwa n'umunyeshuri.
kirundi.design_note_no_buffer_capacity_score_n: Icyitonderwa cy'igishushanyo: nta manota y'ubushobozi bwa buffer, nta buto yo guhishura, nta isuzuma rya quiz. Ibisubizo byerekanwa nk'imiterere 2 itandukanye (nziza / mbi) aho kuba urwego rukomeza — ku bushake, kugira ngo bigabanye imyitwarire yo kunoza. Icy'ingenzi ni ubushakashatsi, si umubare.
